rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces taxable property values, which directly affects 'wealth per student' under §48.273(a)(4), potentially reclassifying districts among Categories 1–3 and altering their payment installment schedules.
quote: "Wealth per student" means the taxable property values reported by the comptroller to the commissioner under Section 48.256 divided by the number of students in average daily attendance.
_note: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) indirectly impacts the wealth-per-student calculation that determines district categorization and payment timing under this section.
